features: 𝐇𝐢𝐠𝐡-𝐐𝐮𝐚𝐥𝐢𝐭𝐲 𝐏𝐫𝐢𝐧𝐭: Professionally printed on heavyweight, high-resolution paper with vibrant, fade-resistant inks.
𝐒𝐢𝐳𝐞 𝐎𝐩𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧𝐬 𝐀𝐯𝐚𝐢𝐥𝐚𝐛𝐥𝐞: Choose from A4 or A3 sizes to perfectly suit your wall space.
𝐀𝐯𝐚𝐢𝐥𝐚𝐛𝐥𝐞 𝐅𝐫𝐚𝐦𝐞𝐝 𝐨𝐫 𝐏𝐫𝐢𝐧𝐭 𝐎𝐧𝐥𝐲: We offer our designs framed or unframed, allowing you to either buy a print only and purchase your own frame or purchase ready to hang on the wall.
𝐈𝐝𝐞𝐚𝐥 𝐆𝐢𝐟𝐭 𝐟𝐨𝐫 𝐂𝐡𝐞𝐥𝐬𝐞𝐚 𝐅𝐚𝐧𝐬: Ideal for birthdays, Christmas or just to surprise a loyal Chelsea supporter.
𝐌𝐚𝐝𝐞 𝐢𝐧 𝐭𝐡𝐞 𝐔𝐊: Created with care by a passionate UK based printing business.
description: Product Description The Perfect Gift or Collectable Available Print Only (Unframed) or Framed Celebrate the legacy of Chelsea FC with this stunning Stamford Bridge poster – a must-have wall art piece for any true Blues supporter. 𝐀𝐮𝐭𝐡𝐞𝐧𝐭𝐢𝐜 𝐒𝐭𝐚𝐝𝐢𝐮𝐦 𝐃𝐞𝐬𝐢𝐠𝐧 𝐏𝐫𝐞𝐦𝐢𝐮𝐦 𝐐𝐮𝐚𝐥𝐢𝐭𝐲 𝐏𝐫𝐢𝐧𝐭 𝐈𝐝𝐞𝐚𝐥 𝐆𝐢𝐟𝐭 𝐟𝐨𝐫 𝐂𝐨𝐥𝐥𝐞𝐜𝐭𝐚𝐛𝐥𝐞 𝐟𝐨𝐫 𝐂𝐡𝐞𝐥𝐬𝐞𝐚 𝐅𝐚𝐧𝐬 𝐀𝐯𝐚𝐢𝐥𝐚𝐛𝐥𝐞 𝐅𝐫𝐚𝐦𝐞𝐝 𝐨𝐫 𝐏𝐫𝐢𝐧𝐭 𝐎𝐧𝐥𝐲 Made In The UK Behind these designs sits a UK based team of experts in design and print working tirelessly to provide customers with products they are proud to display in their homes, workplaces and beyond. Framed Or Print Only For those who want to purchase a ready to receive gift we offer a framed poster, for those who want perhaps a different coloured frame, there is the option to purchase a print only poster, scaled ready to fit a frame of your choosing. Premium Product The paper we use for our prints has been sourced direct from the best paper mills in the world and coated using the latest coating technology for long lasting premium print. Colours That Pop Our team pride ourselves on the attention to detail in each of our designs, the paper used has been purposely selected to make the prints more eye-catching while giving off less glare, allowing them to be hung in any room with any lighting.
